summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Intelligence Arena integration. All core AI features working excellently including Best Edge Banner, Edge Filters, AI Signals, Risk Badges, Edge Bar visualization, Smart Sorting, and AI Analysis in Bet Sheet.

ui_bugs.issue: CTA button has stability issues due to pulsing animation - difficult to click
ui_bugs.workaround: YES/NO buttons on market cards work perfectly for Bet Sheet access

design_issues.issue: No visible theme toggle button in UI, though theme system works via localStorage

passed_tests: Best Edge Banner displays with highest edge market (SOL → $500)
Best Edge Banner shows AI Prob (58%), Market (45%), Edge (+13%) values
Edge Filter chips work perfectly (All: 4→+5%: 3→+8%: 2 markets)
Market Cards show For You badges (2/4 cards)
Market Cards show Risk badges on all cards (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH)
Edge Bar visualization shows Market vs AI comparison
AI Signal shows BULLISH/BEARISH/WAIT on all cards
Edge Badge shows percentage with color coding on all cards
FOMO Layer shows whale agreement/disagreement (2/4 cards)
Smart sorting puts highest edge markets first
Bet Sheet opens via YES/NO buttons on market cards
Bet Sheet shows AI Analysis section with brain icon
Bet Sheet displays AI Probability (58%), Market (45%), Edge (+13%)
Bet Sheet shows AI reasoning: 'Breakout forming with volume confirmation'
Place Bet button shows Edge percentage: 'Place $25 Bet (+13% Edge)'
Category filters work (Trending, Live, Closing, Volume)
Light theme works correctly via localStorage
Dark theme works correctly via localStorage
Mock data with AI intelligence loads properly
All AI components properly integrated and functional
